name: threesome invitation
description:
"Wanna have a threesome with us?"

Aya (left) and Kiko (right) are asking you for a threesome with them. They want to experiment a bit more...

Make sure to refresh the first messages until you like their structure. Multiple-character bots tend to talk for the user more often or make other mistakes.

Please suggest bots you want me to make and also check out my other bots.
